name: Creamsicle Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir boiling water into Jello in a large bowl for 2 minutes or until dissolved.
2. Mix cold water and ice to make 1 ¼ cups.
3. Gradually add the mixture to gelatin, stirring until slightly thickened (consistency of unbeaten egg whites).
4. Remove any remaining ice.
5. Stir in tub Cool Whip with a wire whisk until smooth. Refrigerate for 10 to 15 minutes or until the mixture is very thick and will mound.
6. Spoon into crust. There may be some left over.
7. Refrigerate for 3 hours or until firm.
8. Decorate top of pie with Cool Whip just before serving.
